prompt:
{"type":"high-fashion beauty magazine cover","format":"vertical portrait cover, 2:3 aspect ratio","subject":{"identity":"{argument name="subject description" default="elegant young Asian woman"}","framing":"extreme close-up beauty portrait with the eyes, nose, lips, and one cheek filling the frame","expression":"calm, intimate, powerful gaze directly toward the viewer","features":"large glossy dark brown eyes, softly groomed brows, dewy real skin texture, natural peach-brown lips, subtle warm eye makeup","hair":"dark black hair with loose wispy strands crossing the forehead and face","pose":"face slightly tilted, cheek resting against a soft cream knitted sleeve or sweater cuff at the lower left"},"style":{"photography":"ultra-realistic editorial fashion photography, luxury magazine cover aesthetic","lighting":"soft cinematic diffused light with warm highlights and gentle shadows","color palette":"{argument name="color palette" default="warm beige, cream, black, soft gold, and ivory"}","mood":"quiet elegance, refined beauty, intimate sophistication","texture":"visible pores, realistic skin sheen, glossy lips, fine hair strands, fuzzy knit fabric texture","depth of field":"shallow depth of field, crisp eyes and lips, softly blurred edges"},"layout":{"composition":"face fills nearly the entire cover; large masthead overlays the forehead and hair; editorial text placed around the face without blocking the eyes","text elements count":5,"text elements":[{"text":"{argument name="magazine title" default="SIGHT"}","position":"very top spanning full width","style":"huge elegant high-contrast serif capitals, off-white, partially cropped by the page edges"},{"text":"{argument name="issue date" default="JANUARY 2024"}","position":"upper right under the masthead","style":"small uppercase serif, off-white"},{"text":"BEAUTY

FOCUS.","position":"upper left beside the eyebrow area","style":"small stacked uppercase serif, off-white"},{"text":"{argument name="cover story title" default="The Art of Elegance"}","position":"lower right over the dark hair and cheek area","style":"large refined serif title case, off-white"},{"text":"COVER STORY
by SIGHT MAGAZINE","position":"bottom right below the cover story title","style":"small uppercase and title-case serif, off-white"}]},"camera":{"lens":"macro portrait lens, close focus","angle":"straight-on intimate crop","quality":"high-resolution commercial beauty retouching while preserving natural skin detail"},"negative_prompt":"no cartoon style, no illustration, no plastic skin, no harsh flash, no distorted face, no extra eyes, no garbled typography, no cluttered background"}
